scene.message: Maki: No...{wait_fr:60}{nl} It can't be...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Three Sonomuras...{wait_fr:88}{nl} They're all her?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Three Makis...{nl} Seriously... no way...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Don't dwell on it.{nl} You were just being used!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: No, that's not it...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Sniff...{nl} Y-you!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Nomoraka tanomamaa.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: N-noooo!!{nl} I don't want this!!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Nomoraka tanomamaa.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Noooo!!{nl} {ctl07:1}...!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura!!{wait_fr:88}{nl} Sonomuraaaaaa!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura!{nl} Come over here, okay?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Please... send me{nl} back into the heart!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: The hell?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Grit your teeth!!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What's that?!{nl} Something's in the mirror?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey!?{nl} Something's in the mirror!!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Look at the mirror!{nl} Something's appearing.{waitkey}{ret}
